title: Electrical stimulation of temporal and limbic circuitry produces distinct responses in human ventral temporal cortex
description: This dataset comprises intracranial EEG recordings from five patients undergoing single-pulse electrical stimulation of temporal and limbic circuitry at Mayo Clinic. The study investigates Basis Profile Curve identification and distinct neural responses evoked in human ventral temporal cortex through direct brain stimulation, providing insights into functional connectivity and processing speed within the human connectome.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings were collected during single-pulse electrical stimulation delivered at approximately 0.2 Hz frequency. Stimulation parameters included 200-microsecond duration, biphasic waveform, and 6 mA amplitude. Patients were at rest during the recording sessions.
